mapper.select:
SELECT group.id , group.deleted , group.created_at as createdAt , group.modified_at as modifiedAt , group.group_name as groupName , group.user_id as userId , group.space_id as spaceId
, user.id as userId , space.id as spaceId FROM group LEFT JOIN user ON group.userId = user.id LEFT JOIN space ON group.spaceId = space.id WHERE group.id = #{id}
SELECT group.id FROM group WHERE group.id is not null
